description_long: This is a compact, off-road style SUV with a vibrant green and black color scheme, featuring bold tire tread graphics and the word 'COMPAS' prominently displayed on the hood and sides. The vehicle has a rugged, open-frame roll cage structure, large oversized tires with deep treads for enhanced traction, and a minimalistic, utilitarian interior with two bucket seats and a simple dashboard. The front end is equipped with a winch and a sturdy bumper, while the rear is flat and open, lacking a traditional trunk or hatch. The side profile reveals angular bodywork and exposed wheel arches, emphasizing its off-road capabilities. The windshield is upright and framed in metal, providing protection while maintaining visibility. The overall design suggests a focus on durability and performance in challenging environments, suitable for both urban and off-road adventures.
description: A compact, open-frame off-road SUV with oversized tires, green and black graphics, and a rugged roll cage. Features include a winch, bucket seats, and bold 'COMPAS' branding.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the flat back, exposed roll cage, and large rear tires with 'COMPAS' branding.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angular bodywork, open cabin, and oversized tires with deep treads.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the upright windshield, winch, sturdy bumper, and 'COMPAS' logo on the hood.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the open-frame design, bucket seats, and aggressive tire profile.
attribute_wheel_design: Oversized black rims with deep off-road treads and no visible spokes
